title: SOA-Harness v1.0 Permission Decision Request
description: Normative schema for the request body of POST /permissions/decisions (Core §10.3.2). Drives the §10.3 decision pipeline (resolver + dispatch) with audit-row side effects.

tool.description: Tool name from the Tool Registry (§11). MUST exist in the loaded registry or the Runner returns 404.

session_id.description: Session whose activeMode governs the capability check. MUST match the session scope of the presenting bearer.

args_digest.description: SHA-256 of the invocation arguments as the request context would carry them. For conformance tests lacking real args, the validator MAY pass sha256:0000…0000 (64 zeros).

pda.description: Compact JWS of the signed canonical-decision.json per §6.1.1 row 4. Required when the §10.3 resolver computes Prompt; omitted (or null) otherwise. Verified against security.trustAnchors before the decision is accepted.
